_source: docs/PLAN/PARITY-TARGETS.md §A (Schedule Quality) + §B (DCMA-14) + §C (baseline compliance / HSD) + §E (Schedule-Network change). Acumen Fuse exports for the non-CUI commercial-construction sample (ADR-0003/0005). Project5 refreshed to the authoritative current Project5_TAMPERED.mpp (ADR-0112): the prior committed golden was a stale capture (37 stored-critical; the authoritative file has 4 — ADR-0109). Project5 §A/§B/§C headline figures are Acumen-exact and independently anchored by tests/engine/test_chain_acumen_reference.py against the 2345 Metric History Report. Since 2026-07-07 (ADR-0151) the §A/§B/§C rows the delivered P2-P5 export suite carries — and the whole §E block — are additionally validated ENGINE==FUSE against verbatim transcriptions in fuse_exports_2026-06.json (tests/parity/test_fuse_export_parity.py).

_deltas.schedule_quality_missing_logic: §A Missing Logic is all-activity-scoped here (engine: P2 6 / P5 7). Acumen's report-scoped Missing Logic is INCOMPLETE-scoped and equals DCMA01 (P2 4 / P5 5), which the chain test (ADR-0111) validates exact against the 2345 report. The two differ by the completed activities that carry missing logic; both are reproduced exactly at their own scope.
_deltas.SN01_total_activities: engine reports 126 (schedulable / non-summary activities, the population used by every other framework here); Acumen's §E header counts all 144 task rows (incl. 18 WBS summaries; excl. the single project-summary root). Headline-only; the forensic change counts are unaffected. ADR-0013.
_deltas.change_P2_to_P5_engine_pinned: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-07 (ADR-0151): the §E float/critical subset is no longer engine-pinned self-consistency — it is Fuse-validated (ENGINE==FUSE) against the operator-delivered export suite (fuse_exports_2026-06.json + tests/parity/test_fuse_export_parity.py). new_critical (1, UID 131) and float_erosion (1, UID 131) are UID-exact; no_longer_critical matches at 34==34 with exactly one member swapped (engine UID 99 vs Fuse UID 96 — the stored-vs-pure-CPM critical-flag basis, ADR-0010; asserted exactly, never forced). finish_date_slips (9) is UID-exact vs Fuse CEI-Incomplete; remaining_duration_increases (9) is UID-exact vs the Fuse Forensic Original-Duration sheet; start_date_slips (9) is count-consistent with Fuse CEI Starts 0.40 (no per-activity Fuse list exists). net_finish_impact_days (-148) stays on the engine's CPM-finish basis by design: Fuse HSD10 = -134 over STORED finishes; the two reconcile to the day (-148 = -134 - 15 + 1, the ADR-0108 data-date gap) and the re-validation of both numbers is gate-asserted.
_deltas.ssi_driving_slack_golden: tests/fixtures/golden/ssi_uid143 was validated against the SSI MS Project add-on run on the PRIOR Project5 (37 stored-critical). It is stale against the authoritative file; test_ssi_driving_slack_exact is xfail pending an SSI driving-slack export for the current Project5_TAMPERED.mpp (ADR-0112).

_scores_deferred.note: Acumen composite scores use a proprietary Bad/Neutral/Good weighting not published in the exports or the Acumen 8.11 metric guide. Per-check counts/pass-fail are reproduced exactly; the composite scores are a calibration item (ADR-0012). Project5's composite is not refreshed (deferred).

cei._note: Single-schedule EVM CEI (engine/metrics/evm.py). CEI(Finish)=completed_on_time/forecast_to_be_finished (= Baseline Finish Compliance). CEI(Start)=started_on_time/forecast_to_be_started (= Acumen 'Started On Time' %, 38/23). Baseline Start Compliance (41) is DISTINCT — its Half-Step-Delay numerator compares actual start to baseline FINISH (ADR-0083, residual resolved).

Single-schedule EVM CEI (engine/metrics/evm.py). CEI(Finish)=completed_on_time/forecast_to_be_finished (= Baseline Finish Compliance). CEI(Start)=started_on_time/forecast_to_be_started (= Acumen 'Started On Time' %, 38/23). Baseline Start Compliance (25) is DISTINCT — its Half-Step-Delay numerator compares actual start to baseline FINISH (ADR-0083, residual resolved).

change_P2_to_P5._comparison: Project5 (current, authoritative) vs Project2 (prior) — matched by UniqueID. §E values are Fuse-validated (ENGINE==FUSE) against the 2026-06/07 delivered export suite — see _deltas.change_P2_to_P5_engine_pinned (superseded caveat, ADR-0151), fuse_exports_2026-06.json, and tests/parity/test_fuse_export_parity.py. net_finish_impact_days stays on the engine's CPM-finish basis (-148; Fuse's stored-finish HSD10 is -134, reconciled exactly).

bow_wave_cei._note: Pairwise, forecast-anchored Bow-Wave CEI (engine/bow_wave.py, /cei view). P2 is the first snapshot (no prior → null). For the P5 snapshot, P2's status month is May-26 so the CEI period is Jun-26: P2 forecast 3 finishes into Jun-26, all 3 actually finished by end of Jun-26 → CEI 1.00. Distinct from the single-schedule EVM CEI above (re-verified ADR-0052).
